subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses and made them clear evidences for all who dwell upon earth, that they may recognize the Truth when it appeareth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الایات و جعلها بینات لمن فی الارض لیعرفن الحق اذ ظهر بین
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
